More than just tennis.
It’s family.

NEXTGEN Tennis Academy is a place where players are challenged, supported, and inspired. We help athletes of all ages grow technically, tactically, and mentally while creating a positive environment where kids feel confident on and off the court.

Programs for every stage

Clear development from first rally to competitive match play.

🎾

Futures

Beginner-friendly training focused on fundamentals, coordination, confidence, and fun.

⚡

Development

Structured sessions that build technique, movement, rally skills, and early match awareness.

🏆

High Performance

Competitive pathway for committed players looking to train harder, compete smarter, and raise their level.

Warm community. Real connection.

Parents trust environments where kids feel seen, supported, and excited to come back. That’s the heartbeat of NEXTGEN.

High performance with purpose

For players aiming higher, NEXTGEN blends strong coaching, competitive mindset, and real match experience.

Meet the team

A coaching team that brings experience, energy, and care to every stage of development.

Head Coach
Nina Nieves
TPA-certified tennis coach specializing in both high-performance and all-around player development. As a former competitive player who trained at the prestigious Bollettieri Academy in Florida, I bring firsthand match experience and international training exposure to every session.

Fluent in English, Serbian, and Spanish, I connect easily with a diverse group of players and families. My coaching focuses on developing strong technical fundamentals, smart tactical awareness, and a confident, resilient mindset.

I create structured, challenging, and engaging practices that build consistency, discipline, and love for the game—guiding players of all levels to reach their full potential while enjoying the journey.
Book Private Lesson
High Performance Coach
Dušan Vemić
Former ATP professional with career-high rankings of No. 146 in singles and No. 31 in doubles, Dušan Vemić brings world-class experience to the court. Known for his powerful serve and doubles expertise, he has competed at the highest levels of the sport.

Following his playing career, Dušan transitioned into elite coaching, working with top players including Novak Djokovic and the Bryan Brothers. His coaching combines high-performance standards, technical precision, and strategic insight developed from years on the professional tour.

Dušan is passionate about helping players understand the game at a deeper level, improving both their performance and competitive mindset.
Book Private Lesson
Performance Coach
Daniel Riquelme
Daniel Riquelme is a certified tennis coach who began playing at age 7 in Chile, developing a strong foundation on red clay that shaped his patience, movement, and strategic approach to the game. After moving to Canada in 2014, he discovered a passion for coaching and earned his certification in 2021.

Since 2022, Daniel has been coaching at Milton Tennis Club and across the GTA, helping players of all levels grow their skills, confidence, and love for the game. His coaching style combines strong fundamentals, positive energy, and a thoughtful understanding of player development.
Book Private Lesson
Performance Coach
Emilia
Emilia’s experience as a top-level junior player, along with her language skills, makes her an outstanding coach for players looking to improve their game. We’re proud to have her on our team.

• Former Top Junior player (ITF, Tennis Europe, and Canada)
• Certified Tennis Canada Coach
• Fluent in 5 languages: French, English, Spanish, Portuguese, and Polish
• Works with players of all ages
Book Private Lesson
Performance Coach
Suriyan
TPA-certified tennis coach specializing in high-performance juniors. As a former competitive player, he brings firsthand match experience to help athletes improve technically, tactically, and mentally.

He creates structured, challenging practices that build confidence, consistency, and a strong competitive mindset—guiding players to reach their full potential while developing a true love for the game.
Book Private Lesson
